title: Bosch 7x EXPERT Self Cut Speed Spade Drill Bit Set (for Softwood, Particleboard, Ø 16-32 mm, Professional Accessory Rotary Drill/Drivers)
features: Up to 3x faster than Bosch 2609255269 Spade Bit
Fast drilling is easier with Bosch Tip Technology
1/4" Impact rated Hex shank for use in impact driver and drill driver
Ideal for fast and rough drilling in all types of softwood, such as drilling through holes for cables, pipes, and other hardware installations; easy to use in tight niches; not suitable for hardwood
Scope of delivery: Bosch EXPERT Self Cut Speed Spade Drill Bit Set 16/18/20/22/25/32 mm 7-pc

Bosch Expert Range The best solutions for every challenge. The best your tool can get. This is the Bosch Expert Range. Bosch Tip Technology Up to 3x faster than a standard drill bit. *EXPERT SelfCutSpeed Vs. Bosch Spade Bit Interface Hex shank for maximum power transfer in standard three-jaw drills and hexagonal screwdriver chucks. Material Ideal for making fast holes in softwoods, chipboard and particleboard, such as drilling single studs for cabling; or dowel installation on railings. Previous page Up to 3x faster than a standard drill bit Its Bosch patent threaded tip draws the spade bit into wood with only the lightest pressure from the user, which is especially helpful when drilling upside down or in tight niches. Expert SelfCut Speed Drill Bits Spade bits are a great accessory for electricians and other installation and building workers. Expert Range Overview Ideal for making fast holes in softwoods, chipboard and particleboard, such as drilling single studs for cabling; or dowel installation on railings. Easy to use in tight niches. The best your tool can get Fits tools of most brands. Next page
